positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions — structurally optimal vehicle for a Lebanese resident. Portfolio anchor. APRIL 27 UPDATE: Position at 38.50% of holdings NAV (1.9989 shares, $1,534.10 market value at $767.47/share, +6.18% unrealized). S&P 500 hit fresh all-time high of 7,165.8 on April 25; tech sector is #1 in momentum rankings (Alpha Z +1.85). The multi-report structural underweight remains fully closed. Cash deployment of $142.09 unconditional tranche must execute at April 28 open; May 3 hard deadline is 6 days away. Any post-earnings residual cash also flows to CSPX by May 3. $142B AUM, 0.07% TER. Thesis conviction: STRONGER. No structural invalidation conditions triggered.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered during Liberation Day tariff shock. Core thesis: AWS cloud dominance (~33% global cloud market share), advertising revenue at double-digit growth, and AI infrastructure investment (Bedrock, Trainium custom silicon). APRIL 27 UPDATE: Current price $263.99 (+23.39% unrealized from $213.94 cost basis). Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, 2026 at 5:30 PM ET. Updated consensus: $1.63 EPS, $177.27B revenue (+14% YoY). AWS growth expected to reach mid-20% range (25%+). Multiple analyst upgrades this week: BofA $298, BMO $315, UBS $304, Goldman Sachs $290 price targets. Average analyst target $286.23 (+15.3% upside from $263.99). 42 Buys / 3 Holds — Strong Buy consensus. ADD $75 post-earnings if: AWS growth >25% AND Q1 EBIT above $20B AND Q2 guidance maintained or raised. Thesis conviction: STRONGER.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP on a sustained basis
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from the retail/advertising business
Sustained margin compression across all segments (retail, advertising, AND cloud simultaneously)
Q1 2026 operating income below the low end of the $16.5B guidance floor with a Q2 guide-down

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so carries zero WHT exposure despite US domicile. APRIL 27 UPDATE — WATCH FLAG MAINTAINED, CONVICTION WEAKER: GLD at $433.25 (April 24 XML mark), buffer above $420 trim trigger slightly improved to 3.1% (from 2.6% on April 23). POSITIVE: GLD recovered slightly. INSTITUTIONAL HEADWINDS PERSIST: Morgan Stanley downgraded gold year-end target from $5,700/oz to $5,200/oz; March gold ETF outflows were largest since 2013. NEW GEOPOLITICAL RISK TO THESIS: US-Iran peace talks potentially resuming in Pakistan drove Friday April 25 equity rally — if formal talks progress and Hormuz reopens durably, 4-week GLD invalidation clock could start. As of April 27: clock has NOT started (Iran seized 2 ships since ceasefire; Hormuz de facto closed). BULLISH SUPPORTS INTACT: Stagflation backdrop (CPI +3.3% YoY, oil >$100/barrel), central bank demand ~850 tonnes 2026 forecast, PBOC building reserves. Wall Street consensus ~$464.70 GLD target, base case $480-$520. Goldman Sachs spot gold $5,400 year-end target. Thesis conviction: WEAKER (macro pillars intact but institutional headwinds, peace talk risk, and proximity to $420 trigger require heightened monitoring).
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening cycle driven by structurally higher real rates that persist above inflation
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend (multiple major central banks becoming net sellers)
GLD breaks and holds below $420 on a daily close — triggers 25% trim rebalance (~$108) into CSPX immediately

Iran war fully and durably resolved AND Strait of Hormuz formally reopened AND risk-on environment maintained for 4+ consecutive weeks — assess 25% trim at that point (4-week clock NOT started as of April 27; peace talks in Pakistan represent increased risk of clock starting)
Morgan Stanley's reduced target ($5,200/oz) combined with continued institutional ETF outflows for 2+ more consecutive months — would weaken conviction toward DETERIORATING

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: 30% WHT on dividend — confirmed $3.33 withheld YTD (MA dividend only). Annualised WHT drag <$5 at current position size. Immaterial.
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network duopoly (MA + Visa) with near-monopoly economics, asset-light model generating high ROE, global consumer spending volume exposure, and pricing power. APRIL 27 UPDATE: Current price $504.17 (-1.77% unrealized from $513.24 cost basis). Pre-earnings consolidation — not a thesis signal. 35 of 38 analysts Buy/Outperform; BMO Capital initiated Outperform rating in April 2026. Average price target $654.66 (+30% upside from current $504.17). Earnings EPS consensus $4.40/share (+18% YoY from $3.73). Q1 2026 earnings confirmed April 30, 2026. Q1 covers January-March (pre-peak Iran escalation), so cross-border volumes expected clean. Note: ~$200M one-time restructuring charge expected — focus on adjusted EPS and operational metrics, not reported optics. Key watch metrics for ADD $100 on April 30: cross-border volume must exceed Q4 2025's 14% rate AND VAS growth must sustain above 20% (Q4 exit rate 22%) AND guidance maintained or raised. WHT drag <$5/year at current size — immaterial. Thesis conviction: SAME (pending April 30 earnings data).
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (FedNow, open banking) gaining scale at the expense of card networks
Regulatory caps on interchange fees in core US or European markets
Q1 2026 earnings miss on cross-border volumes or management guides down — re-evaluate immediately on April 30
Sustained global consumer spending contraction lasting multiple quarters

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware; CUDA ecosystem creates deep switching costs. APRIL 27 UPDATE: Current price $208.27 (+14.45% unrealized from $181.98 cost basis). Nearing all-time high of $212.19. Vera Rubin AI servers confirmed in full production: 3.3x speed improvement over Blackwell Ultra, H2 2026 shipments on track. YoY revenue growth 65.47%. EARNINGS DATE: Conflicting sources — some cite May 20, others May 27 for Q1 FY2027 earnings. Verify via NVIDIA investor relations (ir.nvidia.com) before that date. Q1 FY2027 consensus: $78.8B revenue, $1.75 EPS. $1T+ combined Blackwell AND Vera Rubin backlog through end-2027 — doubled from $500B one year ago. Average analyst target ~$268 (47%+ upside from $208.27). 63 analysts covering; strong Buy consensus. China H200 ban: zero China H200 revenue confirmed — structural drag known and priced in. Hyperscalers collectively committing $600B+ in 2026 AI capex. RSI technically overbought — normal post-rally consolidation, not thesis signal. Thesis conviction: STRONGEST IN PORTFOLIO.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) takes meaningful and sustained share in AI training workloads
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers visibly cut or guide down infrastructure spend across multiple quarters
Export restrictions to China expand materially beyond current guidance, reducing total addressable market by >15%
Post-GTC 2026: $1T+ order backlog proves overstated or a significant portion of orders cancelled in subsequent quarters
Vera Rubin production delays extending beyond Q3 2026 — would defer the next re-rating catalyst

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent / capital preservation layer with 0% effective WHT. Replaced SGOV (which carried 30% WHT on distributions) — structurally optimal for Lebanese residents. US Treasury interest paid to an Irish-domiciled fund qualifies for the portfolio interest exemption from NRA withholding. Near-zero duration risk (0-3M). APRIL 27 UPDATE: Position at 15.09% of holdings NAV (5.6247 shares at $106.88, $601.17 market value, -1.12% unrealized). YTM ~3.67% — well above 3.0% trim trigger. FOMC April 28-29 universally expected to hold at 3.50-3.75% (Polymarket 99.9% probability) — stage-down trigger (explicit dovish signal) will NOT fire this week. Next stage-down review: June 2026 FOMC meeting. Continued Iran-Hormuz closure reinforces capital preservation rationale. STAGE-DOWN PLAN ACTIVE: Target reduction toward ~10% of NAV in stages conditional on Fed dovish signaling. Thesis conviction: SAME.
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively (>100bps in 2026) — opportunity cost vs equities rises significantly, accelerate trim
A better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle with superior risk-adjusted return is identified
Portfolio NAV grows large enough (>$10K) that maintaining a 15% cash equivalent layer imposes unacceptable drag on long-term returns
YTM falls below 3.0% — at that point, reduce toward 8-10% of NAV immediately
